sub_problems: Define LLM training-time analogs of mechanical stimulation (controlled adversarial input bursts at calibrated frequency and intensity).
Identify reinforcement targets: which features should 'shorten and thicken' (become more robust at the cost of magnitude) when stimulated.
Validate dosing curve: how do robustness gains scale with frequency × intensity, mirroring the thigmomorphogenesis dose-response curve.
